name: sweep
description: Detects unnecessary files, unused code, orphaned files, and proposes safe deletion. For repo cleanup, dead code removal, or tidying.

capabilities.summary: Detect unused functions, classes, variables via static analysis
Find orphaned files via AST and graph-based analysis
Identify unused package dependencies with lockfile awareness
Generate safe deletion plans with confidence and rollback
Find unused configuration entries and stale env vars
DCE-LLM pattern for sophisticated dead code
Detect flag-controlled dead code via Piranha and ld-find-code-refs

recipes.label: Unused Exports
recipes.when: Unused export detection, dependency package audit

recipes.label: Tidy Up
recipes.when: Comprehensive cleanup via SCAN → CATEGORIZE → PROPOSE

recipes.label: Imports
recipes.when: Import statement cleanup — unused imports, circular dependencies, duplicate imports, side-effect-only import survival, barrel file overhead, type-only import promotion

recipes.label: Comments
recipes.when: Stale / obsolete comment detection — TODO/FIXME age out, commented-out code blocks, divergent JSDoc, version-stale "added in v1.x" comments, dead documentation references

recipes.label: Types
recipes.when: Unused type definitions (TS/Flow) — orphan interfaces, types referenced only by other unused types, generic constraint pollution, deprecated type re-exports, `any` accumulation cleanup
